channel.title: Horizon on Cyrentis
channel.description: Recent content in Horizon on Cyrentis

item.title: Cyrentis Shares Its 2026 New Year Message
item.description: Cyrentis shared its 2026 New Year message with thanks to customers, project partners, suppliers, and collaborators who supported the company during its first stage of development.

item.title: Cyrentis Expands Horizon with Fusion, Command, Archive, and Link
item.description: Following the public introduction of Horizon Sense, Cyrentis announced the next visible set of Horizon platform components in May 2025, extending the software direction from device management into operational workflow.

item.title: Cyrentis Formally Established and Introduces Horizon Sense
item.description: Wuhan Cyrentis Technology Co., Ltd. announced its formal establishment on April 1, 2025, with a business focus on integrated monitoring systems built around software, sensing products, and deployment-oriented engineering services.
